Bindings.Binding: local distance = _G["AutoMarkerUIFrameMarkDistEditBox"]:GetText() local markDifferent = _G["AutoMarkerUIFrameMarkDifferentCheckBox"]:GetChecked() local name = "" if UnitExists("target") then name = UnitName("target") end local commandStr = "markdist " .. (distance or "20") .. " " .. (markDifferent and "1" or "0") .. " " .. name SlashCmdList["AUTOMARKER"](commandStr)
